| Active, follow-up due Mar 26 | 1 | Alex Su (LinkedIn only, no email) |
| Active, follow-up due Mar 28 | 3 | Dawn Aston, Yair Areli, Javier Rosas |
| Fresh (sent Mar 24, no action needed yet) | 6 | Brian Heppner, Lance Goler, Alan Keller, Helen Peck, Jairus Oliver, Barry Holley |
| LinkedIn only, awaiting connection accept | 5 | Miran Cisic, Brad Glover, Beth Douglas, Alexandra Giusto, Brittany Breese |
| Replied / converted | 0 | |

**Total in active funnel: 20 (+ 10 pending approval)**

---

**WHAT'S BLOCKING PROGRESS RIGHT NOW**

Two approval gates are sitting open from today:

1. **5 follow-up emails** (Melanie Smith, Jonathon Blackburn, Mark Evans, Max Greenwald, Justin McDonald) - drafted at 04:26 this morning. These are the warmest contacts in the funnel, Day 5 today.

2. **10 new prospect drafts** (all 5 channels each) from the PDL batch - presented at 09:00. Three flagged for your review (Thomas Glasgo / Smart Express, Kimberly Morrow / TouchSource, Dale Durrett / Omeda).

Nothing goes out until you approve. The longer those 5 Day 5 follow-ups sit, the more the timing drifts from the original email.

---

**GROWTH TIER CONTEXT**

The Growth package (25 companies, $499) is well within reach once one prospect converts. At the current pace, you have enough volume in the funnel to realistically hit that within the next week or two if connections start accepting and replies come in. The Mar 21 cohort is the most advanced and most likely to produce the first signal.

**Recommended actions before end of day:**
- Approve or reject the 5 Day 5 follow-up emails (time-sensitive)
- Work through the 10 new prospect approvals, at minimum the 7 strong-fit ones
- Check LinkedIn for any new connection acceptances from the Mar 21-22 cohort (Jonathon Blackburn, Justin McDonald, Miran Cisic, Brad Glover, Beth Douglas still pending)
